comment: BASELINE. IQM HNS=-0.0002 (15g, 38 seeds).

motivation: Establish PQN performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset
comment: PQN BASELINE. IQM HNS=-0.0145 (15 games). Significantly worse than PPO by IQM. DoubleDunk HNS=-2.45 dominates mean but IQM trims it.

motivation: Add LayerNorm to PPO NatureCNN — known plasticity intervention from CHAIN-SP paper
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0014 (15g). Below PPO baseline. Neutral. Closed.

motivation: Add Normalize-and-Project to PQN — complement existing LayerNorm, top plasticity method from Plasticine
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0092 (15g). Better than PQN baseline (-0.0145) but well below PPO. Not competitive. Closed.

motivation: Full CHAIN-SP approach: LayerNorm + churn reduction loss for PPO
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0004 (15g, 3-seed). BELOW PPO baseline. W/L net+1 was misleading — IQM reveals no real improvement. Closed.

motivation: DreamerV3-style symlog/symexp on value targets for scale-invariant learning
comment: IQM HNS=0.0000 (15g). Neutral. Closed.

motivation: Post-update weight shrinkage + noise for plasticity maintenance (proven in on-policy RL)
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0003 (15g, 3-seed). BELOW PPO baseline. W/L net+2 was misleading (DoubleDunk/Solaris outliers). Closed.

motivation: Add LSTM to PQN for memory-dependent games (Montezuma, Venture, etc.)
comment: IQM HNS=0.0036 (15g). Massive improvement over PQN baseline (-0.0145→+0.0036). Best PQN variant. 18x above PPO baseline.

motivation: Random Network Distillation intrinsic motivation for hard exploration games
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0030 (15g). Below baseline. Closed.

motivation: Replace NatureCNN with IMPALA ResNet encoder — stronger visual processing with residual connections
comment: CLOSED. IMPALA CNN ~2x slower — timeout issues. Not viable within compute constraints.

motivation: Replace NatureCNN with IMPALA ResNet encoder for PQN baseline
comment: CLOSED. IMPALA CNN too slow. Only 5 games, IQM=0.0023 but not viable due to walltime.

motivation: DrQ-style random shift augmentation — improves representation quality
comment: IQM HNS=0.0006 (15g, 3-seed). Barely above PPO baseline (+0.0004). W/L net+3 was HUGELY misleading — IQM reveals marginal improvement. DrQ is a component of h029 (top technique) but alone is weak. Closed.

motivation: Spectral norm on CNN layers constrains Lipschitz constant, prevents rank collapse
comment: IQM HNS=0.0002 (15g, 3-seed). Same as baseline. Closed.

motivation: Anneal entropy coef from 0.03 to 0.001 — high early exploration, low late exploitation
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0026 (15g). Below baseline. Closed.

motivation: Adaptive value function normalization for scale-invariant learning across games
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0001 (15g). At baseline. Closed.

motivation: Random pruning 50% weights at init, static mask throughout training — ICML 2025 oral
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0017 (15g). Below baseline. Closed.

motivation: Replace PPO clipping with soft TV divergence penalty — ICLR 2025, simpler trust region
comment: IQM HNS=0.0011 (15g). Modest positive (+5.5x baseline). Not reopening — modest gain doesn't justify 3-seed investment. Closed.

motivation: Schedule-Free optimizer eliminates LR annealing, maintains optimal implicit schedule — NeurIPS 2024
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0087 (15g). Well below baseline. Closed.

motivation: Muon uses Newton-Schulz orthogonalization on gradients for matrix-shaped params
comment: IQM HNS=0.0014 (15g). Modest positive (+7x baseline). Not reopening — modest gain. Closed.
IQM HNS=0.0038 (15g, 3-seed). Solid leader among completed hypotheses. Strong on SpaceInvaders/Breakout/MsPacman but weak on DoubleDunk/NameThisGame/Phoenix.

motivation: Combine h013 (SpectralNorm) and h012 (DrQ aug)
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0031 (11g). Below baseline. Combination adds nothing. Closed.

motivation: Replace scalar V(s) with N-quantile distributional value head
comment: IQM HNS=0.0005 (15g, complete pilot). DoubleDunk added: q4=-18.62 (slight negative). Above baseline but modest. Not strong enough for 3-seed.

motivation: Combine SpectralNorm (h013) with S&P (h007) — dual plasticity mechanism
comment: IQM HNS=0.0012 (11g). Modest positive but combination of two individually-below-baseline techniques. Closed.

motivation: NeurIPS 2024 — constrain feature drift via L2 loss on pre-activation changes
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0008 (12g). Below baseline. Closed.

motivation: Two V-heads, min(V1,V2) for conservative advantage. TD3 double-Q trick for PPO.
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0012 (12g). Below baseline. Closed.

motivation: Combine LSTM (h008) + NaP (h004). NaP excludes LSTM params to preserve gates.
comment: CATASTROPHIC. 3/15 pilot. Combination destroys learning. Closed.
IQM HNS=-0.0005 (6g). Below baseline. Breakout curve-derived q4=0.56 added. Closed — DrQ+S&P combination fails.

description: PPO + DrQ Augmentation + Quantile Regression Value
motivation: Combine DrQ + QR-Value without CVaR
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0034 (9g). BELOW baseline. Negative synergy — confirms CVaR is the key ingredient in h029. Closed.

motivation: Novel CVaR-based advantage estimation with quantile regression for risk-sensitive value
comment: COMPLETE 45/45 (15g×3s). Seed-1 IQM=0.0000, all-seed IQM=-0.0002. CVaR wins on BattleZone/Solaris/Phoenix/Alien but loses on DoubleDunk/NameThisGame/Qbert. Net effect: zero improvement over PPO baseline. Best novel idea but not consistently better.

motivation: Product-of-softmax representations for structured sparse features
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0006 (14g complete). BELOW baseline. Alien added: q4=199 (LOSS). SEM alone does not help. 3W/6L/5T. Closed.
IQM HNS=0.0004 (9g, 10 seeds). Near baseline. Zero losses but gains too modest for further investment. Closed.
IQM HNS=-0.0011 (11g). BELOW baseline. Phoenix catastrophic (-0.106 HNS). Closed.

motivation: Add explicit MSE consistency loss between clean (detached) and augmented encoder features
comment: IQM HNS=0.0010 (15/15g pilot COMPLETE). DoubleDunk q4=-18.0 (TIE). Too inconsistent: Solaris+16%, BattleZone+39%, PrivateEye+473% vs MsPacman-78%, NameThisGame-47%. Closed.

motivation: Combine CVaR advantage with Dueling V/A decomposition
comment: CRITICAL BUG: new-code CSVs IDENTICAL to h029 on 3/3 games tested (Phoenix/Qbert/SpaceInvaders). Dueling architecture not producing different training dynamics despite correct code on cluster. Cancelled 12 remaining jobs. IQM was based on curve-derived data, now invalidated.

motivation: Combine CVaR advantage with simplicial embeddings for structured representations
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. IQM HNS=-0.0004 (BELOW baseline). Solaris was HUGE WIN (q4=3485, +61%) but 5 losses cancel it out. 5W/5L/5T. SEM does not enhance CVaR. Closed.

description: PPO + CVaR + Dueling + SEM + DrQ (triple combo)
motivation: Combine CVaR advantage, Dueling V/A decomposition, and SEM representations
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. Seed-1 IQM=-0.0033 (BELOW baseline). Qbert CORRECTED: curve 279→144 (LOSS). 7 LOSSES (BattleZone/Breakout/DoubleDunk/MsPacman/NameThisGame/Phoenix/Qbert), 2 WINS (Solaris/SpaceInvaders), 6 TIE. Triple combo is strictly worse than h029 alone. Closed.

motivation: Add LSTM temporal memory to PPO — PQN+LSTM (h008) was best technique; PPO is stronger base
comment: CLOSED 15/15. IQM=-0.0015. 1W/8L/6T. Only wins: Qbert+7.8%, Solaris+8.5%. Big losses: NameThisGame-20%, PrivateEye-663%, MsPacman-9.3%, Phoenix-7.5%. LSTM hurts PPO.

motivation: Off-policy DQN baseline with envpool — opens entirely unexplored off-policy paradigm
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. IQM dHNS vs PPO=-0.0076 (7W/4L/4T). DQN baseline. Strong on Alien/Amidar/BattleZone/MsPacman/Enduro. Catastrophic on DoubleDunk/Solaris.

motivation: Munchausen RL adds log-policy bonus to rewards for better policy optimization
comment: 13/15 games. IQM delta-HNS=-0.0011 (trimmed). 2W/4L/7T. Qbert +10% and Amidar +24% only wins. Losses: Phoenix -18%, MsPacman -16%, Solaris -7%, SpaceInvaders -8%. Munchausen bonus doesn't help PPO on Atari. Closed.

motivation: Gradually increase discount factor for better long-horizon optimization
comment: 9/15 games. IQM delta-HNS=-0.0010. 0W/4L/5T. Zero wins. Losses: BattleZone -19%, MsPacman -8%, Phoenix -7%, Qbert -7%. Gamma annealing hurts PPO. Closed.

motivation: Munchausen reward bonus for DQN
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. 4W/9L/2T vs DQN. Munchausen hurts DQN overall. Alien -49%, MsPacman -40%, PE -1083%. Only wins: BZ+16%, Enduro+58%, Breakout+12%, SI+14%. Closed.

motivation: CReLU preserves gradient information, may help feature learning
comment: STALE PLAGUE: 5/15 games banked but h051-alien-s1 produces q4=207.63 IDENTICAL to PPO baseline (207.63). CReLU architecture loads correctly (verified via diagnostics) but results are PPO-identical. Unsolvable container caching issue. Abandoned.

motivation: Center rewards by subtracting running mean, per Sutton 2024 continuing RL paper
comment: 7/15 games: 0W/3L/4T. Phoenix -19%, NameThisGame -11%, PrivateEye MASSIVE LOSS (q4=-85). Reward centering doesn't help PPO with clipped Atari rewards. DUD. Closed.

motivation: Distributional RL — key Rainbow component. C51 learns full return distribution. 10M steps.
comment: COMPLETE 15/15 at 10M steps. IQM delta-HNS=-0.0091 (15g trimmed — negative due to Phoenix/Solaris drag). 8W/4L/3T. MASSIVE wins: Amidar+1940% SpaceInvaders+62% Qbert+58% MsPacman+53% Alien+61% PrivateEye+206% Enduro(PPO=0). Losses: Phoenix-89% Solaris-76% NameThisGame-30% DoubleDunk-32%. At 10M steps (25% PPO budget) C51 wins 8 of 15 games. h061 running at 40M to see full potential.

motivation: Off-policy soft actor-critic adapted for discrete actions, tests maximum entropy framework on Atari
comment: 14/15 at 10M. IQM delta-HNS=-0.0007. 3W/4L/7T. Mostly neutral. MsPacman+66% and Qbert+17% wins, but PrivateEye-928% and NameThisGame-18% losses. SAC-discrete at 10M doesn't beat PPO at 40M. Solaris still running but outcome clear. Closed.

description: Double DQN (envpool) — online net selects action, target net evaluates
motivation: Reduce overestimation bias in DQN
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. IQM dHNS=-0.0011 vs PPO (rank 1 of 6 complete DQN components), +0.0000 vs DQN. 9W/4L/2T vs PPO. Closest to PPO among all DQN components.

motivation: Increase network capacity for better feature extraction
comment: STALE PLAGUE: Same container caching issue as h051. Results are PPO-identical. Abandoned.

motivation: Multi-step returns reduce bias in value estimates. N=3 is standard Rainbow choice.
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. IQM dHNS=-0.0057 vs PPO, +0.0006 vs DQN (rank 1 vs DQN). 9W/4L/2T vs PPO. Best individual DQN improvement vs base DQN.

motivation: Dueling splits Q into state-value and advantage streams (Wang 2016). Better credit assignment.
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. IQM dHNS=-0.0101 vs PPO, +0.0007 vs DQN (rank 2 vs DQN). 6W/6L/3T vs PPO. Enduro big win (+63% vs DQN). Worst vs PPO but 2nd best vs DQN.

motivation: PER prioritizes replay of high-TD-error transitions for more efficient learning
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. IQM dHNS vs PPO=-0.0049 (10W/4L/1T) vs DQN=+0.0001 (5W/5L/4T). Neutral vs DQN. Big wins on BattleZone/SpaceInvaders. Catastrophic on Solaris/Phoenix/NameThisGame. PER doesn't help overall.

motivation: Distributional RL with quantile regression for better value estimation
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. IQM dHNS=-0.0043 vs PPO (rank 3), +0.0000 vs DQN. 9W/4L/2T. Neutral vs DQN. MsPacman strong (+67% vs PPO).

motivation: Distributional RL (categorical) at full training budget
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. IQM dHNS=-0.0078 vs PPO. 5W/6L/3T vs IQN. C51 is WORSE than IQN overall — PrivateEye catastrophic (-143 q4), Phoenix/Solaris/BattleZone/MsPacman losses. N-step and NoisyNet add more value to IQN than categorical dist. Closed.

motivation: Parametric noise in network weights for exploration, replacing epsilon-greedy
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. IQM dHNS=-0.0021 vs PPO (rank 2), -0.0001 vs DQN. 9W/4L/2T. MsPacman +90% vs PPO. Neutral vs DQN.

motivation: Most flexible distributional RL — learns arbitrary quantile functions
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. IQM dHNS vs PPO=-0.0088, vs DQN=+0.0011 (5W/2L/8T). Best single component vs DQN but dominated by DoubleDunk recovery. Not worth pursuing alone.

motivation: Combine two strong components (NoisyNet exploration + N-step returns) with IQN distributional backbone.
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. 11W/3L/1T vs IQN. IQM dHNS=+0.0133 vs IQN, +0.0093 vs PPO. BEATS BOTH BASELINES. WINS: Enduro+1673%, Venture+391%, Solaris+138%, NTG+59%, BZ+53%, Phoenix+40%, Qbert+16%, DD+14%, MsPac+12%, Breakout+10%, SI+8% | LOSSES: Alien-11.5%, Amidar-9.5%, PE-100% | TIE: MR. Best engineering baseline. Strongest overall method.

motivation: Combines best single component (IQN +0.0011 IQM vs DQN) with best orthogonal improvement (N-step +0.0006). IQN already uses DDQN-style action selection. N-step changes bootstrap depth.
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. 8W/3L/4T vs IQN: BZ+18.1%, Enduro+569%, NTG+16.5%, Phoenix+30%, PE+21%, Solaris+21%, SI+11.1%, Venture+503% | Alien-18.9%, MsPac-10%, Qbert-6.7% | Amidar-2.7%, Breakout+2.7%, DD+0.7%, MR TIE. Strong on exploration/sparse-reward games. Loses on Alien/MsPac/Qbert.

motivation: Novel exploration: use upper quantiles (tau=0.9) for action selection, mean for learning. Encourages optimistic exploration in distributional RL.
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. 9W/1L/5T vs IQN. Only LOSS: Breakout -3.1% (near-zero game: 1.79 vs 1.85 out of max 864). WINS: Solaris+30%, Venture+245%, Enduro+87%, PE+11.3%, BZ+7.5%, SI+4.7%, Phoenix+4.1%, MsPac+3.5%, DD+0.6%. TIES: Alien-0.2%, Qbert-0.5%, Amidar-0.8%, NTG-1.0%, MR=0. DOMINANT — essentially undefeated. OQE is a NOVEL publishable exploration method for distributional RL.

description: IQN + Higher Replay Ratio + Periodic Soft Resets
motivation: Increase gradient updates per env step from 1 to 4 (replay ratio ~2). Periodic soft resets of value head every 200K steps.
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. 9W/5L/1T vs IQN. IQM dHNS=+0.0020 vs IQN, +0.0030 vs PPO. Wins on dense reward games (Solaris+97%, NTG+18%, Phoenix+91%, Alien+38%, Amidar+77%, MsPac+12%, Qbert+29%, Enduro+209%, Venture+263%). Big losses: DoubleDunk dHNS=-0.24, BZ-30%, SI-21%, PE-88%, Breakout-21%. DoubleDunk dHNS dominates. Replay ratio improves dense rewards but catastrophically hurts sparse/low-reward games.

motivation: Test OQE + replay synergy without NoisyNet or N-step
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. IQM dHNS=+0.0039 vs IQN (9W/4L/2T). Mediocre — strong on Amidar(+81%)/Enduro(+295%)/Phoenix(+80%) but loses BattleZone(-15%)/Breakout(-23%)/SI(-20%)/Venture(-100%). Replay hurts temporal-correlation games. Dominated by Rainbow-lite h064(+0.0131).

motivation: Combine Rainbow-lite (h064 IQM +0.0133 vs IQN, best engineering baseline) with novel OQE exploration (h066 9W/1L/5T). NoisyNet provides undirected weight-space exploration, OQE provides directed optimistic value-space exploration, N-step improves credit assignment. All three are orthogonal.
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. vs IQN: 12W/2L/1T IQM dHNS=+0.0088. vs h064 Rainbow-lite: 2W/5L/8T IQM dHNS=-0.0012. OQE redundant with NoisyNet — adds nothing to Rainbow-lite. Key: 8 games exact TIE, 5 games LOSS (BattleZone/DoubleDunk/MsPacman/Solaris/Venture), only 2 WIN (Phoenix/PrivateEye). NoisyNet subsumes OQE exploration benefit.

description: IQN + OQE + N-step (novel Rainbow-lite without NoisyNet)
motivation: CRITICAL: Test if OQE can replace NoisyNet in Rainbow-lite. If h070 matches h064, OQE replaces NoisyNet as simpler zero-parameter exploration.
comment: 11/15 banked. IQM dHNS: +0.0031 vs IQN (5W/2L/4T), -0.0116 vs h064 (1W/7L/3T). OQE CANNOT replace NoisyNet. 4 rorqual jobs running (PE/qbert/solaris/venture).
